# Pointer record (PTR)

*Internet standard*. A DNS record that maps an IP address to one hostname in a domain. It is also known as a reverse DNS record.

To configure [reverse DNS][rDNS] for your dedicated IP address in Twilio SendGrid, add a [CNAME record][cname] to your DNS server.
